name: API Security Protection
description: Security rules tailored for REST and GraphQL APIs. Detects JSON injection, mass assignment attempts, GraphQL introspection abuse, and API-specific attack patterns. Recommended for API backends.
author: Ghostwire Proxy

rules.name: JSON Injection — Prototype Pollution
rules.description: Detects JavaScript prototype pollution attacks via JSON payloads.

rules.name: JSON Injection — NoSQL Operators
rules.description: Detects MongoDB/NoSQL injection via query operators in JSON.

rules.name: Mass Assignment — Sensitive Fields
rules.description: Logs attempts to set privileged fields that may indicate mass assignment attacks.

rules.name: GraphQL — Introspection Query
rules.description: Logs GraphQL introspection queries. Consider blocking in production.

rules.name: GraphQL — Batching Attack
rules.description: Detects GraphQL query batching that could be used for DoS or bypassing rate limits.

rules.name: GraphQL — Deep Nesting
rules.description: Detects deeply nested GraphQL queries (7+ levels) that could cause performance issues.

rules.name: JWT Token in URL
rules.description: Logs JWT tokens passed in URL query parameters, which is a security risk.
